summary: Deliverable is incomplete and non-functional. Critical issues: (1) Workflow references `tests/test-aggregator.ps1` and fixture files that don't exist—act would fail immediately. (2) Actions not pinned to SHA (v4→40-char SHA), violating GH Actions security best practices. (3) run-act-tests.ps1 test expectations (lines 56-58: 'Tests Passed', 'Failed: 0') don't match actual workflow output—tests will fail or be fragile. (4) Missing Set-StrictMode in scripts; Parse-JunitXml/Parse-JsonTestResults lack error handling for malformed input. (5) Required artifact act-result.txt does not exist. (6) Code duplication in run-act-tests.ps1 (Invoke-ActTest invoked 3x with similar patterns, lines 54-73). Workflow structure is sound but blocked by missing dependencies.
